samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulate input data and output after 4 inputs.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Valid input signal.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Valid output signal.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="IDLE">0</parameter>
        <parameter name="INPUT">1</parameter>
        <parameter name="OUTPUT">2</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">State.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="combinational_logic" width_description="[1:0]">Next state.</reg>
        <reg id="count" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">Count.</reg>
        <reg id="next_count" type="combinational_logic" width_description="[1:0]">Next count.</reg>
        <reg id="sum" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[9:0]">Sum.</reg>
        <reg id="next_sum" type="combinational_logic" width_description="[9:0]">Next sum.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        Always accumulate 4 input data and output after 4 inputs. 
        When valid_in is 1, data_in is a valid input. Accumulate 4 valid input data_in values and calculate the output data_out by adding these four values together. 
        There is no output when there are fewer than 4 data_in inputs in the interim. Along with the output data_out, a cycle of valid_out=1 will appear as a signal. 
        The valid_out signal is set to 1 when the data_out outputs 4 received data accumulation results. Otherwise, it is set to 0.
    </implementation>
</module>
